risk.desc: Design does not account for thermal expansion in rail guides
risk.mit: Include thermal expansion joints in rail guide design

physics_paths.path_description: 20g launch vibration load transmitted through frame structure
Electrical power flow from solar panels to battery via frame-mounted wiring
Thermal cycling from -40 to +80C affecting rail deployment mechanisms
Rail deployment motion initiated by deployment mechanism
Solar pressure impacting frame stability in orbit
Field service access for maintenance and inspection

risk.desc: Potential thermal expansion issues due to material mismatch between Al 7075 and CFRP.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal expansion analysis and adjust fastener preload.

risk.mit: Ensure proper wire positioning and conduct burn-wire release test.

risk.desc: Thermal stability may be compromised if thermal straps are not properly installed.
risk.mit: Ensure thermal straps are correctly routed and secured during assembly.

_subsystem_plan.subsystem_role: EO payload optics bench, thermal stability, optical baffles, focal plane interface, lens mounts

physics_paths.path_description: Structural loads from launch and deployment shock are transferred to the CubeSat structure through mounting interfaces.
Thermal energy from internal electronics is managed by thermal straps and baffles.
Optical alignment adjustments are made through removable lens mounts.
Electrical signals from sensors are routed to the focal plane through harnesses and connectors.
Service access for maintenance and alignment is provided through an inspection window and removable covers.

integration_opportunities.description: Optical payload can be integrated into the optics bench for alignment and thermal management.
Sensors can be integrated into the focal plane for data acquisition.
Inspection windows provide access for maintenance and alignment.

verification_focus.description: Verify structural integrity under launch and deployment loads.
Verify electrical signal integrity and routing.
Verify accessibility for maintenance and alignment.
